CustomField.description: Formula field that automatically calculates the overall room condition based on inspection results for Walls, Furniture, Bathroom, Flooring, and Windows/Doors. Returns "Out of Service" if any area has Major Damage, "Needs Attention" if any area has Minor Damage, and "Clean & Ready" if all areas are in Good condition.
CustomField.formula: IF( OR( ISPICKVAL(Walls__c, "Major Damage"), ISPICKVAL(Furniture__c, "Major Damage"), ISPICKVAL(Bathroom__c, "Major Damage"), ISPICKVAL(Flooring__c, "Major Damage"), ISPICKVAL(Windows_Doors__c, "Major Damage") ), "Out of Service", IF( OR( ISPICKVAL(Walls__c, "Minor Damage"), ISPICKVAL(Furniture__c, "Minor Damage"), ISPICKVAL(Bathroom__c, "Minor Damage"), ISPICKVAL(Flooring__c, "Minor Damage"), ISPICKVAL(Windows_Doors__c, "Minor Damage") ), "Needs Attention", "Clean & Ready" ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Automatically calculated based on room inspection results. "Clean & Ready" — all areas are in good condition. "Needs Attention" — minor damages detected, service required. "Out of Service" — major damages detected, room cannot be occupied.
CustomField.label: Overall Condition
